findings.title: Notification agent can send to any recipient without allowlist
findings.recommendation: Implement recipient allowlist per notification channel

findings.title: Message templates accept unvalidated user input
findings.recommendation: Sanitize all template variables before rendering

findings.title: Inter-agent message routing uses unencrypted local transport
findings.recommendation: Add TLS or HMAC signing for agent-to-agent messages

findings.title: WhatsApp API token shared across all 6 agents
findings.recommendation: Issue per-agent tokens with minimal required scopes

findings.title: No agent identity verification on incoming message handlers
findings.recommendation: Verify sender passport before processing agent-initiated messages

findings.title: Twilio/WhatsApp SDK versions not pinned
findings.recommendation: Pin all messaging SDK dependencies with hash verification

findings.title: Message history stored without access controls
findings.recommendation: Add per-agent read permissions on message archives

findings.title: No sandbox for message template rendering
findings.recommendation: Render templates in restricted environment without network access

findings.title: Bulk message sends lack human approval
findings.recommendation: Require approval for sends exceeding 10 recipients

findings.title: No rate limiting on outbound messages per agent
findings.recommendation: Implement per-agent send rate limits matching platform quotas
